overall.description: A ship bridge simulation showing nighttime navigation through a harbor. The vessel approaches and passes through a gate structure while the operator monitors radar and navigation displays. The footage shows game engine graphics with three functional navigation screens visible at the top of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge interior with forward navigation view

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring radar and chart displays while navigating through the harbor

entered.detail: three-screen navigation setup with GPS chart, rotating radar, and sonar display
forward deck structure of the vessel visible through the bridge windows
dark harbor water stretching ahead of the vessel
faint illumination from shore facilities visible on the port side

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from a ship's bridge at night, with three illuminated navigation monitors visible at the top of the frame. The vessel moves steadily forward through calm harbor waters, with the bow structure visible through the forward windows and distant shore lights on the left.

events.description: vertical gate structure with illuminated bars appears directly ahead in the water
vessel passes through the center of the gate structure

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through the narrow gate opening, continuing to monitor navigation instruments

entered.detail: vertical white barrier bars or pilings marking a harbor entrance or lock gate

segments.scene_description: The vessel approaches a gate structure with vertical illuminated bars spanning the waterway. The camera moves forward through this narrow passage, with the gate structure growing larger and then passing by the sides of the vessel. The navigation monitors continue to display radar and chart data throughout the maneuver.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor channel after gate passage

events.description: vessel clears the gate structure and enters open channel water

agents.ego_description: continuing forward navigation through the open harbor channel beyond the gate

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the vessel continues moving through open harbor waters. The view returns to open water ahead with the ship bow visible, and white wave splash effects appear on the port side as the vessel maintains steady forward motion through the channel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as the vessel navigates from open harbor waters through a narrow gate structure and back into the open channel. It begins with a steady forward motion through calm nighttime waters, where three illuminated navigation monitors at the top of the frame contrast with the distant shore lights on the left. As the vessel advances, the view shifts toward a gate structure with vertical illuminated bars that grow larger until the camera passes directly through the narrow passage. The scene then opens back up into the harbor, with the ship's bow returning to a clear vista of open water. Finally, the motion continues steadily forward as white wave splashes appear along the port side, marking the vessel's progress through the channel.
